title: Stocks Hit Record Highs After US-Iran Deal Reports: Markets Wrap
summary: Wall Street traders sent stocks to all-time highs, bonds advanced while a rally in oil waned amid speculation about a diplomatic breakthrough in the three-month war that has rattled global markets.

title: Asian Stocks to Rise on Firming US-Iran Sentiment: Markets Wrap
summary: Asian equities were poised to advance after gains in US stocks and Treasuries, as reports suggested Washington and Tehran were nearing an agreement to extend a ceasefire.

title: Oil Edges Lower at Open on Tentative Deal to Extend Iran Truce
summary: Oil edged lower after the US and Iran tentatively agreed to extend their ceasefire by 60 days, potentially allowing traffic to restart through the critical Strait of Hormuz.

title: Worthington Steel Raises $1.4 Billion for Klöeckner Takeover
summary: Worthington Steel Inc. raised $1.4 billion in the leveraged-finance market Thursday to help fund its acquisition of German metals company Klöeckner & Co SE.

title: Jefferies Sued by Fund Investors Alleging Water Firm Fraud
summary: Jefferies Financial Group Inc. has been hit with an investor class action lawsuit over bond purchases made by its 352 Capital fund in a water vending machine firm that federal prosecutors have called a scam.
